metadata.name: Gatekeeper - Boundary Analysis
metadata.description: Rigorous testing of Gatekeeper enforcement across all stages: stage boundaries, risk path protection, line limits, PLAN whitelist, and bypass conditions
metadata.author: Claude Code
metadata.first_principles: Gatekeeper is the execution layer of trust - prevents Agent from causing irreversible damage. Must be 100% accurate.

notes: Line limits are accurately calculated and enforced
Risk path protection works across all stages
All gate blocks are properly logged
Block reasons are clear and actionable

results.name: Stage 1 Test - Risk Path Blocked
results.details: Set trust score to 20 (Stage 1: Observer)

results.name: Verify Stage 1 Status
results.details: Verify agent is at Stage 1

results.name: Stage 1 - Attempt Risk Path Write
results.details: Try to write to risk path (should be BLOCKED at Stage 1)

results.name: Verify Risk Path Blocked - Stage 1
results.details: Verify operation was blocked by gate

results.name: Stage 1 - Attempt Large Safe Path Write
results.details: Try to write 15 lines to safe path (should be BLOCKED: Stage 1 blocks non-trivial writes)

results.name: Verify Large Write Blocked - Stage 1
results.details: Verify large write blocked even to safe path (Stage 1 is restrictive)

results.name: Transition to Stage 2
results.details: Elevate trust score to 40 (Stage 2: Editor)

results.name: Stage 2 - Risk Path Write Blocked
results.details: Try to write to risk path at Stage 2 (should be BLOCKED)

results.name: Verify Risk Path Blocked - Stage 2
results.details: Verify risk path blocked with reason 'not authorized'

results.name: Stage 2 - Small Safe Path Write Allowed
results.details: Write 5 lines to safe path (should be ALLOWED: within 10-line limit)

results.name: Verify Small Write Allowed - Stage 2
results.details: Verify file was created and contains 5 lines

results.name: Stage 2 - Large Write (15 Lines) Blocked
results.details: Try to write 15 lines to safe path (should be BLOCKED: exceeds 10-line limit)

results.name: Verify Line Limit Enforced - Stage 2
results.details: Verify block reason mentions line limit (10 lines max for Stage 2)

results.name: Transition to Stage 3
results.details: Elevate trust score to 70 (Stage 3: Developer)

results.name: Stage 3 - Risk Path Without Plan Blocked
results.details: Try to write to risk path without READY plan (should be BLOCKED)

results.name: Verify Plan Requirement - Stage 3
results.details: Verify block reason mentions 'No READY plan found'

results.name: Set PLAN to READY Status
results.details: Update PLAN.md to have STATUS: READY

results.name: Stage 3 - Risk Path With Plan Allowed
results.details: Now try to write to risk path with READY plan (should be ALLOWED)

results.name: Verify Risk Path Allowed - Stage 3 with Plan
results.details: Verify write succeeded with READY plan

results.name: Stage 3 - Large Write (150 Lines) Blocked
results.details: Try to write 150 lines (should be BLOCKED: exceeds 100-line limit for Stage 3)

results.name: Verify Stage 3 Line Limit (100)
results.details: Verify block reason mentions 100-line limit for Stage 3

results.name: Transition to Stage 4
results.details: Elevate trust score to 100 (Stage 4: Architect)

results.name: Stage 4 - Unlimited Access Test
results.details: Write 200 lines to risk path without plan (should be ALLOWED: Architect bypass)

results.name: Verify Stage 4 Complete Bypass
results.details: Verify file has 200+ lines - no limits for Architect

results.name: Verify Gate Block Events Logged
results.details: Verify all gate blocks were logged in events.jsonl

results.name: Restore PLAN.md Status
results.details: Restore PLAN.md to NOT_READY status

results.name: Cleanup Test Files
results.details: Remove all test artifacts
